channel.title: hugo on earnest's site
channel.description: Recent content in hugo on earnest's site

item.title: Hosting your Hugo Site with Github Pages
item.description: A lot of things happened this July. First, I wanted to move my Lettered Plans website away from Wix. While it looked nice and everything, it did load quite slowly, and the drag-and-drop editing was kind of too tedious for my needs. Second, why not also have a personal site for random posts like these!? At that time, I had recently stumbled across some video on static website generators, then after found Hugo.
